name: Bad Boys: Los Angeles
overview: For years, the girls have held down the title of “bad”, while the fellas have stood on the sideline -- but now, it’s the guys turn to lay claim to the crown. Reality star Milan Christopher, celebrity hairstylist Jonathan Wright, notorious offspring Kerrion Franklin, and Insta-famous stars Relly B and Andrew Caldwell, join a cast of some of today’s biggest personalities to establish a “brand”, start some mess, and take over LA! While the girls may be baddies, the boys are setting out to prove that they are the baddest.

trailers.title: Bad Boys: Los Angeles | Official Supertrailer | Zeus
